MoodEntry.title: MoodEntry
MoodEntry.description: An individual user's daily mood assessment and physiological wearable metrics.

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the record owner

moodScore.description: Rating of mood on a scale of 1 to 10

stressLevel.description: Calculated or subjective stress score from 1 to 10

heartRate.description: Heart rate in BPM (physiological wear metric)

hrv.description: Heart rate variability in milliseconds (physiological wear metric)

primaryStressors.description: Primary triggers identified such as Work, Sleep, Health, Social

encryptedNotes.description: AES-GCM client-side encrypted notes about the reflection

JournalEntry.title: JournalEntry
JournalEntry.description: Client-side encrypted diary reflections securing HIPAA grade privacy.

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the record owner

encryptedBody.description: AES-GCM encrypted diary details body content

iv.description: Initialization vector used for the encryption payload

ForumPost.title: ForumPost
ForumPost.description: Uplifting messages submitted anonymously to the encouragement channel.

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID of the sender

authorAlias.description: Self-selected supportive pseudonym for GDPR anonymity protection

avatarSeed.description: A seed used to design a custom visual avatar illustration

category.description: Classification tags like Encouragement, Breathing, General

likedBy.description: List of user UIDs who have liked this reflection for query filtering

moods.description: Collection of daily mental assessments and wearable physiological metrics.

journals.description: Secure journals stored entirely as encrypted ciphertexts client-side.

forum.description: Public general discussions for shared encouragement and community support.
